title: Advanced Pod Configuration — Pod overhead
text:
Pod overhead allows you to account for the resources consumed by the Pod infrastructure on top of the container requests and limits.
---
apiVersion
:
node.k8s.io/v1
kind
:
RuntimeClass
metadata
:
name
:
kvisor-runtime
handler
:
kvisor-runtime
overhead
:
podFixed
:
memory
:
"2Gi"
cpu
:
"500m"
---
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Pod
metadata
:
name
:
mypod
spec
:
runtimeClassName
:
kvisor-runtime
containers
:
-
name
:
myapp
image
:
nginx
resources
:
requests
:
memory
:
"64Mi"
cpu
:
"250m"
limits
:
memory
:
"128Mi"
cpu
:
"500m"
